  "findings": [
    "Differential pressure (DP) impulse lines are sloped incorrectly for the process service.",
    "Gas taps are located below the pipe centerline, risking liquid accumulation in the lines.",
    "Liquid taps are located on top of the pipe, risking gas pocket entrapment in the lines."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route and re-slope the impulse lines to match the process service requirements.",
    "Relocate the process taps to the correct orientation (gas taps on top/upper quadrant, liquid taps on the side/lower quadrant) as per API RP 551."
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP impulse lines are installed with incorrect slope and tap orientation for their respective services. Gas taps must be taken from the top or upper quadrant of the process line to prevent liquid accumulation, and liquid taps must be taken from the side to prevent gas entrapment. This incorrect installation will lead to measurement errors and process control issues.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals"
  ]
}
